series_metadata.series_description: Files created during the selection process to fill vacant positions. Records may include Position Description, Ohio Civil Service Applications, Job Application Notice, Selection Interview Questions, Application Flow Data, Narrative for Selections, Background Information & Checks, Resumes, Summary Score Sheets, Interview Score Sheets and supporting documentation.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain for three (3) state fiscal years from the date the position is filled or decision not to fill is made. A Certificate of Disposal is required when destroying this record. ; Electronic: Retain for three (3) state fiscal years from the date the position is filled or decision not to fill is made. A Certificate of Disposal is required when destroying this record., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
